recap:
- The Databricks Mosaic AI Agent Framework supports the entire lifecycle of AI agents, from development to production monitoring.
- The lifecycle begins with data preparation and tool creation, involving ETL processes, Vector Search for unstructured data, and tool registration in Unity Catalog.
- Rapid prototyping is facilitated through a no-code interface in AI Playground, allowing for quick tests and model comparisons, followed by quality evaluation using MLflow 3 tools.
- Evaluation and feedback collection involve testing agents with datasets and gathering insights from stakeholders and domain experts.
- Data and feedback are labeled to establish high-quality benchmarks for future iterations of the AI agents.
